name: Lamb Vindaloo
tagline: Goan vindaloo — vinegar-marinated lamb with fiery chili-garlic paste
highlight: Vinegar + chili-garlic — Goa's Portuguese-Konkani fire, no soy

hero.alt: Lamb vindaloo in dark red gravy with potatoes
hero.caption: vindaloo — Goan fire

healthFacts: Vinegar marinade tenderizes tough cuts and acts as a preservative — vindaloo travels well.
Capsaicin from chilies stimulates metabolism and circulation.

steps.title: Make vindaloo paste
steps.detail: Soak chilies in hot water 15 min. Toast cumin, cinnamon, cloves dry 1 min. Blend chilies, garlic, ginger, vinegar, toasted spices into a smooth paste.
steps.tip: Vindaloo paste keeps in the fridge a week — make extra.

steps.title: Marinate lamb
steps.detail: Coat lamb with paste and salt. Marinate 30 min minimum (overnight is dramatic).
steps.tip: Vinegar tenderizes — but don't go past 24 hours or it gets mushy.

steps.title: Brown the onion
steps.detail: Heat 3 tbsp oil in a heavy pot. Cook sliced onion 12 min until deep brown.
steps.tip: Onion to dark gold — that's your sauce body.

steps.title: Braise long
steps.detail: Add lamb with all marinade and 1.5 cups water. Simmer covered 50 min. Add potatoes, simmer 20 min more until tender. Salt to taste.
steps.tip: Better the next day — vindaloo deepens overnight.
